meta.title: Basel Seyam | Software Engineer
meta.description: Basel Seyam's portfolio — software engineering, frontend development, projects and contact information.

hero.title: Basel Seyam — Software Engineer and Frontend Developer

intro.title: I turn ideas into fast, responsive and user-friendly digital experiences.
intro.description: I’m Basel Seyam, a Software Engineer and Frontend Developer with four years of experience building modern web interfaces and practical software solutions.

about.title: Building meaningful digital experiences.
about.subtitle: Software Engineer and Frontend Developer based in Gaza, Palestine.
about.storyTitle: I turn ideas into fast, responsive and user-friendly digital products.
about.storyP1: I’m {name}, a Software Engineer and Frontend Developer with {years} years of experience building modern websites and practical software solutions.
about.storyP2: I have developed more than {projects} projects, including landing pages, electronic invitation platforms and management systems for stores and businesses.
about.storyP3: I focus on responsive design, accessibility, usability and clean, reusable code.
about.certificateOneDescription: Advanced English language training and communication skills.
about.certificateTwoDescription: More than 50 hours of practical frontend development training.
about.skillsTitle: Tools I use to bring ideas to life.
about.cvTitle: Want to know more about me?

services.title: Digital solutions built around your ideas.
services.introduction: From responsive interfaces to practical management systems, I build digital experiences that are fast, clear and easy to use.
services.sectionTitle: How I can help your project.
services.instruction: Select any service to view more information about what it includes.

1.title: Frontend Development
1.shortDescription: Modern, responsive and reusable user interfaces built with clean code.
1.description: I build fast and interactive frontend applications with reusable components, organized architecture and attention to accessibility and performance.

2.title: Responsive Web Design
2.shortDescription: Websites that work smoothly across mobile, tablet and desktop screens.
2.description: I create responsive layouts that adapt naturally to different screens while maintaining readability, usability and visual consistency.

3.title: Landing Pages
3.shortDescription: Focused landing pages designed to present services and attract customers.
3.description: I develop professional landing pages with clear content hierarchy, strong calls to action, responsive design and smooth interactions.

4.title: Management Systems
4.shortDescription: Practical web systems for stores, businesses and daily operations.
4.description: I develop practical management interfaces for inventory, users, sales and business operations using frontend technologies with PHP and MySQL.

5.title: Website Redesign
5.shortDescription: Improving existing websites visually, technically and responsively.
5.description: I redesign outdated websites to improve their visual identity, mobile experience, content organization and overall usability.

6.title: Support & Maintenance
6.shortDescription: Fixing problems, improving performance and maintaining existing websites.
6.description: I help maintain websites, solve frontend issues, improve responsiveness and provide practical technical support when needed.

projects.title: Projects built with purpose and precision.
projects.introduction: A collection of frontend, full-stack, API and progressive web applications designed to solve practical problems and create enjoyable digital experiences.
projects.empty: No projects are available in this category yet.

1.title: Arabic Tetris Game
1.description: A modern Arabic Tetris game featuring responsive controls, colorful visuals, score and level tracking, piece preview, hold functionality and an intuitive interface for desktop and mobile devices.

2.title: GitHub Repository Explorer
2.description: A responsive GitHub repository explorer that allows users to search for GitHub profiles, browse repositories, filter projects by programming language and sort results through a modern interface.

3.title: Gaza Paramedic
3.description: A responsive Arabic health information platform that organizes educational medical content into accessible categories, helping users quickly search and browse general health topics.

4.title: Personalized Invitation System
4.description: A full-stack electronic invitation platform that provides each client with a private account to manage invitees and generate personalized invitation links carrying every guest’s name.

5.title: Smart Task Manager
5.description: A responsive Arabic task management PWA that helps users organize daily activities, assign priorities and deadlines, track completion progress and access saved tasks.
features: Create tasks with descriptions and notes

6.title: Symmetry Stones
6.description: A premium business website created for a renovation and stonework company, presenting its services, completed projects and craftsmanship through an elegant visual identity.

contact.title: Let’s build something meaningful together.
contact.introduction: Have a project, opportunity or idea? Send me a message and I’ll get back to you as soon as possible.
